description_long: This is a bulbous ceramic vase with a narrow neck and a wide, rounded body, featuring a striking collage of painted and photographic elements. The upper neck is adorned with alternating pink, white, and black bands, giving it a modern, decorative flair. The body of the vase is covered in a patchwork of handwritten script, abstract brushstrokes in red, pink, and beige, and sepia-toned photographic imagery, including a visible portrait and a group photo. The surface appears smooth and glossy, suggesting a glazed ceramic finish. The artistic design gives the vase a contemporary, urban aesthetic, making it suitable for display in public or semi-public spaces. The overall impression is one of a unique, art-inspired vessel that blends traditional form with modern visual storytelling.
description: A rounded ceramic vase with a narrow neck, decorated with pink, white, and black bands and a collage of script, photos, and abstract brushstrokes. Its glossy surface and artistic motifs give it a modern, urban appeal.
description_view_0: This view highlights the pink, white, and black neck bands, handwritten script, and a painted portrait on the lower body.
description_view_1: This view features a sepia-toned group photograph on the body, surrounded by red and beige brushstrokes and script.
description_view_2: This side shows bold red and beige abstract brushstrokes, with a partial photographic face and less visible script.
description_view_3: This angle emphasizes handwritten script on pink and beige patches, with red and brown brushwork and minimal photographic detail.
attribute_location: urban gallery or public art display
attribute_pattern: abstract collage with script and photographic motifs
